headlines.title: Microsoft launches new in-house AI models it says cut costs up to 89% versus OpenAI
AI chip startup Etched defies skeptics, hits $10.3B valuation from big-name investors
A look at China's push to catch up with US AI chips; sources: its Vice Premier warned AI companies that anyone who resisted using local chips was a traitor (Wall Street Journal)
The agent security gap: 54% of enterprises have already had an AI agent incident, and most still let agents share credentials
Meta launches Seller, a free standalone app version of Facebook Marketplace; Seller includes AI features that scan photos to fill out listings automatically (Eli Tan/New York Times)
Sources: OpenAI told Hugging Face only this week its models caused the July 11 hack; the models appear to have been active online for days before being stopped (Wall Street Journal)
The great VC exodus: 14 investors who joined startups
Mobileye founder and CEO Amnon Shashua plans to step down after nearly three decades, as the company pushes into robotaxis and humanoid robots (Kirsten Korosec/TechCrunch)
AI Kill Switch Act would let Trump admin order shutdown of rogue AI systems
Multi-turn attacks broke AI models 88% of the time — single-turn testing missed it, Cisco AI security lead warns at VB Transform 2026
Runway launches AI model router as generative media gets crowded
Startup founders urge U.S. government not to shut off Chinese open weight AI
Sources: Shanghai-based GPU maker MetaX confidentially filed for a Hong Kong listing, targeting an IPO by the year-end, amid a surge of fundraising from rivals (Zoe SL Chan/South China Morning Post)
General Catalyst Takes The Lead Over Y Combinator In Backing $5M+ Fintech Deals
AMD teams up with Eric Trump-backed Foundation to build humanoid robots
Genesis AI is in talks to raise about $500m for its robot brains
Nvidia commits $1.5B to Amkor to expand US chip packaging
AI, dual use and spacetech: the new stars of debt funding
Agentic coding goes hands-free as OpenAI brings GPT-Live's full duplex voice control to Codex and ChatGPT on the desktop
Ford is switching from Google to Apple Maps for its next-generation EVs
Insurance startup Corgi reportedly raised more money at $4B — its third round in 8 weeks
AegisAI, founded by former Google security execs, lands $36M to stop AI-driven spear phishing
Tech Moves: Agility Robotics gets CFO; Microsoft security departure; Zap’s legal officer; new KEXP CPTO
The AI context gap: Enterprise AI organizations have a trust problem, not a retrieval problem — and most are still building the fix
